title: Investor - Aggressive Buyer
clientGreeting: Hey, I'm looking to acquire several investment properties this year. I need to move fast and I want someone who can keep up with my pace. What can you do for me?
openingContext: An aggressive real estate investor is calling to discuss multiple property acquisitions. They are direct and results-focused.
clientResponses: Look, I don't have time for lengthy explanations. What properties do you currently have that would yield 10%+ ROI?
I've already done deals in three markets. I'm looking to expand to your area. Give me the bottom line.
Okay, here's what I need: a list of off-market deals, connections with contractors, and a closing timeline under 30 days. Can you handle that?

clientProfile.name: James Chen
painPoints: Tired of slow real estate agents
Frustrated by lack of off-market deal access

evaluationCriteria.respectForTime: Did ISA respect the client's time and get to the point quickly?
evaluationCriteria.competenceShown: Did ISA demonstrate expertise and local market knowledge?
evaluationCriteria.resultsOriented: Did ISA focus on ROI and tangible outcomes?
evaluationCriteria.processEfficiency: Did ISA offer expedited processes and solutions?
evaluationCriteria.networking: Did ISA offer connections and resources?
evaluationCriteria.appointmentClosing: Did ISA secure a meeting or property viewing?
